title: sorbus aria var. graeca
intro: Sorbus aria var. graeca, also known as the Greek Whitebeam, is a variety of the Mountain Ash tree that is native to Greece and the surrounding regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Greek medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sorbus aria var. graeca include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect the body against free radicals and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
